creator: lizbethmutterhunt@gmail.com
text:
Mr. De Groot,

you described precisely what I was doing. It is a complete crash with hang and no debug after restart.

Now I re-installed CURRENT, works fine, but no click on the search hook of widgets: crash immediately! 

It’s an NVIDIA GTX-970, but platform independent.

OT:

Having another problem now after reinstall: installing themes and splash screens from the Internet doesn’t wirke anymore. Looked for a version of csv-url for installing through AppStore. Changing to Cinnamon, where many widgets simply don’t work. 

I think BSD isn’t ignorable, our neighbours and kids (OsX) do lotta good things for us, no commercial, just a comment.

/OT

System stable, freshly build kernel for dem-Knox, X works, sddm (with no nice animation yet)….. set plasma5-plasma up new? Wonder: Kamille works, decide is this for the waste or helpful?
